title: Legends Music - Maestro
description: Adds contextual music from Minecraft Legends using the Maestro mod.
body:
## Description

This Ressource pack integrates reactive soundtrack from the game Minecraft Legends using the Maestro mod depending on the biome and day/night cycle.

## Requires Maestro

Legends Music is a resource pack and requires the [Maestro](https://modrinth.com/mod/maestro-music) mod to function. Without Maestro, the pack will not affect music playback.

## Attribution & Disclaimer

Legends Music uses music from Minecraft Legends Original Soundtrack. Minecraft Legends and its soundtrack are the intellectual property of Mojang Studios. This resource pack is an unofficial fan-made project created for entertainment purposes. No ownership of the original music is claimed. All rights to the soundtrack belong to their respective copyright holders.
